channel.title: Baixin Guo — Blog
channel.description: Research notes and essays on human-AI trust calibration

item.title: Building Tools, Not Just Papers: Why I Code
item.description: Why I believe building functional systems alongside publishing papers is essential for trustworthy AI research.

item.title: The Wrong Question I Spent Months Asking
item.description: After millions of tokens with four AI research partners, I realized I had been optimizing for the wrong thing: contribution categories instead of the ability to repeatedly find important problems.

item.title: The Precision Illusion: Why 6.3% Matters
item.description: An introduction to the precision illusion — the finding that LLMs aren't dangerously overconfident, but subtly misleading in a hard-to-detect way.
